## Checklist
- [ ] I have read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I agree to the IP assignment terms therein
- [ ] I have run `python tooling/validate.py` locally and it passes
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md under [Unreleased]
- [ ] If adding questions: each has a `why-it-matters` field
- [ ] If adding scoring: rubric or threshold is documented
- [ ] If adding regional content: ecosystem and source notes included
